name: Nassau County Civil Service
text:
3413083 | CYTOTECHNOLOGIST I | Open Competitive | Continuous | Posted more than 30 days ago | NASSAU HEALTH CARE CORPORATION | $74,114 - $99,744 | continuous | ANNOUNCED FOR: NASSAU HEALTH CARE CORPORATION SALARY : $74,114 - $99,744 REISSUED ANNOUNCEMENT THIS EXAMINATION WILL BE HELD ON A CONTINUOUS RECRUITMENT BASIS. APPLICATIONS WILL BE SCHEDULED FOR REVIEW ACCORDING TO THE DATE ON WHICH THE APPLICATION IS RECEIVED. NAMES OF SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATES WILL BE CERTIFIED ON THE ELIGIBLE LIST IN SCORE ORDER, REGARDLESS OF THE DATE ON WHICH APPLICATION WAS FILED. NAMES OF SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATES WILL BE REMOVED FROM THE ELIGIBLE LIST AT THE TIME OF APPOINTMENT TO A FULL OR A PART TIME POSITION OR ONE YEAR AFTER BEING PLACED ON THE LIST. CANDIDATES MAY REFILE FOR THIS EXAMINATION NINE MONTHS AFTER BEING PLACED ON THE LIST. | https://www.governmentjobs.com/careers/nassaucountyny/jobs/3413083/cytotechnologist-i
